Use code [duzo](https://www.bisecthosting.com/duzo) for **25%** OFF! ## What does this mod do? - Adds many of your favourite Superheroes into Minecraft! - TODO - finish this lol [](https://minecraftstorage.com/mods/timeless-heroes) ## Credits ### Developers: - [duzo](https://duzo.is-a.dev/) - MakeTendo --- ### Artists: - WeStanKrang - [Magic Man](https://magicmaan.github.io/) (textures + models) - an old classic account --- ## Links ### [PUBLIC BETA](https://github.com/Duzos/superhero/releases) [Github](https://github.com/duzos/superhero/) [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/timeless-heroes) [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/superhero)
